title: Assistant Store Manager - More Retail Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - More Retail Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
More Retail Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail Digital Technologies:
More Retail Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
